testcase.name: test_ask_stories

failure.message: RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_ask_stories.TestAskStories testMethod=test_ask_stories>
def test_ask_stories(self): > ask_stories = self.hn.ask_stories(limit=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ask_stories.py:22: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hackernews/__init__.py:322: in ask_stories ask_stories = self._get_stories('askstories', limit) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:163: in _get_stories return self.get_items_by_ids(item_ids=story_ids) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:216: in get_items_by_ids result = self._run_async(urls=urls) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:139: in _run_async loop = asyncio.get_event_loop() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <asyncio.unix_events._UnixDefaultEventLoopPolicy object at 0x122446510>
def get_event_loop(self): """Get the event loop for the current context.
Returns an instance of EventLoop or raises an exception. """ if self._local._loop is None: > raise RuntimeError('There is no current event loop in thread %r.' % threading.current_thread().name) E RuntimeError: There is no current event loop in thread 'MainThread'.
/opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/asyncio/events.py:715: RuntimeError
